post.description:
Retired: MARRVEL entity seeding now flows through the shared pipeline.

Direct entity creation via ``gateway.create_entity()`` has been removed.
MARRVEL records are ingested as source documents with Tier 1 grounding
attached, then flow through entity recognition → extraction → governed
claims like all other connector families.
post.summary: Fetch MARRVEL gene data and seed graph entities
Run a MARRVEL gene discovery search for a research space

get.summary: Get a MARRVEL discovery search result

get.description: Return all active members for one research space.

post.description: Add or invite a user to one research space. Requires owner-level access.

delete.description: Remove a user from one research space. Requires owner-level access.

get.description: Return the lower-level proposal records for one space. Most callers should start with the unified review queue when they want a single list of items that need attention.
Return one staged proposal with its evidence, payload, ranking, and review status. This is the direct proposal primitive behind the unified review queue.

post.description: Promote one proposal into official graph state after review. Use the review-queue action endpoint when you want the product-facing review surface; use this route when you need the raw proposal primitive.
Reject one staged proposal without promoting it into graph state. Use the review-queue action endpoint when you want the unified review surface.

post.summary: Run one PubMed search for a research space

post.description: Queues research-init work and returns immediately. The response includes a `poll_url` for the run progress endpoint, which callers should poll to observe async completion.
post.summary: Initialize a research space from natural language

get.description: Return the current research-state snapshot for the given space.
get.summary: Get the current research state for a space

get.description: Return the unified review queue for one space. By default this shows pending proposals, pending review-only items, and pending approvals. Use filters such as kind, run_id, document_id, or source_family when you want one slice of the queue. Use the lower-level proposal and approval routes when you need the specialized primitive records directly.
get.summary: List items that still need review

get.description: Return one review queue item with its queue id, evidence, payload, and available actions. Queue ids are stable wrappers over proposals, review-only items, and run approvals.

post.description: Apply a review action through the unified queue surface. Proposal items dispatch to proposal promotion or rejection, review-only items dispatch to conversion, resolution, or dismissal, and approval items dispatch to run approval decisions. Use 'mark_resolved' as the canonical review-item resolve action; 'resolve' remains accepted as a compatibility alias.

get.description: Return harness runs for one research space.

post.description: Queue one harness run after validating graph service availability.

get.description: Return one harness run from the service-local registry.
Return the lower-level approval records for one run. Most callers should use the unified review queue when they want pending approvals mixed with proposals and other review items.

post.description: Set the approval decision for one gated run action. Use the unified review queue when you want the product-facing review surface.
post.summary: Approve or reject one run action

get.description: Return artifacts stored for one harness run.
get.summary: List artifacts for one harness run

get.description: Return one artifact stored for one harness run.
get.summary: Get one artifact for one harness run

get.description: Return the frozen capability snapshot for one run.
Return lifecycle events for one run.

post.description: Store the gated actions a run wants to take so callers can review them before resuming execution.

get.description: Return declared and observed policy decisions for one run.
Return the current progress snapshot for one run.

post.description: Mark a paused run as resumable after approvals are resolved.

get.description: Return the workspace snapshot stored for one harness run.
get.summary: Get workspace snapshot for one harness run

patch.description: Update owner-managed settings for one research space.
